notes: Case 01-21 (Deacon Ha Oak Kim, et al. vs. Korean Capital Presbytery) appears only as docket list entry on GA 30 (2002), p. 110. The case was withdrawn before SJC decision, as noted in the SJC Report statement: 'Cases 01-5, 01-20, 01-21, 01-22, 01-23, 01-24 and 01-29 were withdrawn.' No decision opinion or reasoning text exists for this case.
